title: Steamy Tunisian Leeks Soup
description: A fresh and silky post-workout dish featuring a unique blend of leeks, barbecue sauce, and dairy-free elements, cooked to perfection in a steam setting for maximum flavor.
instructions: Heat the barbecue sauce in a small pan over medium heat until warm. Set aside.
In a large pot, sauté the onion in a little bit of olive oil until translucent.
Add the leeks and cook for about 5 minutes or until softened slightly.
Pour in the vegetable broth, water, and barbecue sauce. Bring to a simmer.
Cover the pot and steam the soup over medium heat for 10-15 minutes until leeks are tender and soup is flavorful.
Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
